SQLLite.SQL: UPDATE WARRANT_RETURNS WR1 SET WR1.ERROR_INDICATOR = ${param.errorIndValue} WHERE WR1.WARRANT_ID IN (SELECT W1.WARRANT_ID FROM WARRANTS W1 WHERE W1.WARRANT_ID = WR1.WARRANT_ID AND W1.CCBC_WARRANT = 'Y' AND W1.ISSUED_BY = '335' AND W1.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER IS NULL AND W1.WARRANT_NUMBER IN ( SELECT W2.WARRANT_NUMBER FROM WARRANTS W2, WARRANT_RETURNS WR2 WHERE W2.WARRANT_ID = WR2.WARRANT_ID AND W2.CASE_NUMBER = W1.CASE_NUMBER AND W2.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL AND WR2.RETURN_CODE = WR1.RETURN_CODE AND TRUNC(WR2.WARRANT_RETURN_DATE) = TRUNC(WR1.WARRANT_RETURN_DATE) AND WR2.WARRANT_RETURNS_ID = ${param.foreignWarrantReturnId} ) ) AND WR1.RETURN_CODE IN ( SELECT RC.RETURN_CODE FROM RETURN_CODES RC WHERE RC.RETURN_CODE = WR1.RETURN_CODE AND RC.RETURN_TYPE = 'F' )

Security.roles: medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper
